# Assessment Overview

This index links to supplementary assessment fact documents generated for this report.

- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md): Service catalog, operation inventory, and communication contracts.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md): Configuration sources, profiles, and sensitive configuration inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md): Primary business workflows, domain mapping, and sequence diagram.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md): Persistence model, entity relationships, and data ownership boundaries.
- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md): High-level application and component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md): Declared external dependencies grouped by functional category.
